subject: Tomogram Denoising - Flat output
body:
Hi Dimitry,

I am trying tomogram denoising using even/odd reconstructions generated by 
splitting reconstructions that were sent to me into even/odd sets, using 
Warp 1.0.7 beta 3 (without the API patch). I did 10000 iterations with 
--dont_flatten_spectrum and no mask supplied, and warp reported that it 
successfully completed. However, my resulting maps have every value set to 
the same float (different between maps, but 100% the same within each map). 
Is there a setting I am missing, or did I maybe do something wrong 
formatting my input data?

Thanks,
Ben
